shared_drive_not_opening.symptom: files won't open from the shared or network drive
shared_drive_not_opening.title: Reconnect your shared drive

steps.say: No problem, we'll get you back in before your meeting. First, can you send me a screenshot of what's on your screen right now?
steps.expect: a file explorer or finder window

steps.say: Thanks, I can see it. Your network drive isn't mounted, that's why the files are missing. Open Finder (or File Explorer) and look in the left sidebar.
Tap the button I've circled to reconnect, then enter your usual sign-in when it asks. I won't see your password, you type it yourself.
You should see the shared folder appear now. Can you open it and confirm your files are back?
steps.expect: the mounted drive with files visible

steps.say: You're all set. I've turned this into a short guide you can keep, so next time you can fix it in seconds without calling.

account_compromised.symptom: account may be hacked, suspicious sign-in, or password changed without you
account_compromised.title: Possible account compromise

steps.say: This could be a security issue, so I'm going to connect you with a human specialist right away who can secure your account safely.

vpn_not_connecting.symptom: the VPN won't connect or remote access is failing
vpn_not_connecting.title: Reconnect your VPN

steps.say: Let's get your VPN back up. Open your VPN app, fully sign out, then sign back in with your work account. Tell me when you've done that.
Great. If it connects you're all set; if it still fails, toggle your Wi-Fi off and on once and try connecting again. Did it connect?
